info.title: Backend Engineer - Code Review and Fix (@backend-developer subagent)

parts.text:
Perform comprehensive backend code review of douglasmitchell.info repository. Focus on:
1. Authentication and session management security
2. API route security (input validation, rate limiting, authentication)
3. Database security (queries, connection management, migrations)
4. Environment configuration and secrets management
5. Error handling and logging security
Identify vulnerabilities, implement fixes, and validate all changes.
I'll perform a comprehensive backend code review of the douglasmitchell.info repository. Let me start by exploring the project structure to understand the codebase better.
Let me also check for any JavaScript files and explore the lib directory more deeply:
Let me also check the API routes:
Now let me examine the key files for security issues. Let's start with the environment configuration:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/lib/env.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { z } from 'zod';
2: 
3: const envSchema = z.object({
4:   // Database
5:   DATABASE_URL: z.string().default('file:./dev.db'),
6:   
7:   // Auth
8:   ADMIN_PASSWORD: z.string().min(8).optional(),
9:   JWT_SECRET: z.string().min(32).optional(),
10:   
11:   // Passkeys (WebAuthn)
12:   PASSKEY_RP_ID: z.string().optional(),
13:   PASSKEY_RP_NAME: z.string().default('Douglas Mitchell Portfolio'),
14:   PASSKEY_EXPECTED_ORIGINS: z.string().optional(),
15:   
16:   // Redis/Cache
17:   UPSTASH_REDIS_URL: z.string().optional(),
18:   UPSTASH_REDIS_TOKEN: z.string().optional(),
19:   
20:   // Storage
21:   STORAGE_PROVIDER: z.enum(['local', 's3', 'r2']).default('local'),
22:   S3_BUCKET: z.string().optional(),
23:   S3_REGION: z.string().default('us-east-1'),
24:   S3_ACCESS_KEY: z.string().optional(),
25:   S3_SECRET_KEY: z.string().optional(),
26:   
27:   // Upload limits
28:   MAX_FILE_SIZE: z.string().default('50'), // MB
29:   UPLOAD_DIR: z.string().default('./public/uploads'),
30:   
31:   // App config
32:   NODE_ENV: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),
33:   NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL: z.string().url().default('https://douglasmitchell.info'),
34:   
35:   // Features
36:   ENABLE_PASSKEYS: z.string().default('true'),
37:   ENABLE_ANALYTICS: z.string().default('false'),
38:   
39:   // Email
40:   SMTP_HOST: z.string().optional(),
41:   SMTP_PORT: z.string().default('587'),
42:   SMTP_USER: z.string().optional(),
43:   SMTP_PASS: z.string().optional(),
44:   FROM_EMAIL: z.string().email().optional(),
45: });
46: 
47: let validatedEnv: z.infer<typeof envSchema> | null = null;
48: 
49: export function getEnv() {
50:   if (validatedEnv) return validatedEnv;
51:   
52:   try {
53:     validatedEnv = envSchema.parse(process.env);
54:     return validatedEnv;
55:   } catch (error) {
56:     if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {
57:       console.error('Environment validation failed:');
58:       error.issues.forEach((err) => {
59:         console.error(`  - ${err.path.join('.')}: ${err.message}`);
60:       });
61:     }
62:     throw new Error('Invalid environment variables');
63:   }
64: }
65: 
66: // Type-safe env export
67: export const env = getEnv();
68: 
69: // Feature flags
70: export const features = {
71:   passkeys: env.ENABLE_PASSKEYS === 'true' && env.ADMIN_PASSWORD,
72:   analytics: env.ENABLE_ANALYTICS === 'true',
73:   email: env.SMTP_HOST && env.SMTP_USER && env.SMTP_PASS,
74:   s3: env.STORAGE_PROVIDER === 's3' && env.S3_BUCKET && env.S3_ACCESS_KEY,
75:   redis: env.UPSTASH_REDIS_URL && env.UPSTASH_REDIS_TOKEN,
76: } as const;

(End of file - total 76 lines)
</content>
state.title: src/lib/env.ts

parts.text: Now let's check the authentication system:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/lib/auth.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { randomBytes } from 'crypto';
2: import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
3: import { SignJWT, jwtVerify } from 'jose';
4: import { cookies } from 'next/headers';
5: import { env } from './env';
6: import { db } from './db';
7: import { clearRateLimit as clearScopedRateLimit, rateLimit } from './rate-limit';
8: 
9: function getJwtSecret() {
10:   const secret = env.JWT_SECRET || (env.NODE_ENV === 'production' ? undefined : 'development-only-secret-change-before-production');
11: 
12:   if (!secret) {
13:     throw new Error('JWT_SECRET must be configured in production');
14:   }
15: 
16:   return new TextEncoder().encode(secret);
17: }
18: 
19: const SESSION_DURATION = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7; // 7 days
20: 
21: export interface Session {
22:   id: string;
23:   userId: string;
24:   email: string;
25:   name: string;
26:   role: 'admin' | 'editor';
27:   expiresAt: Date;
28: }
29: 
30: // Hash password with bcrypt
31: export async function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {
32:   return bcrypt.hash(password, 12);
33: }
34: 
35: // Verify password
36: export async function verifyPassword(password: string, hashedPassword: string): Promise<boolean> {
37:   return bcrypt.compare(password, hashedPassword);
38: }
39: 
40: // Create JWT token
41: export async function createToken(payload: object): Promise<string> {
42:   return new SignJWT({ ...payload })
43:     .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256' })
44:     .setIssuedAt()
45:     .setExpirationTime('7d')
46:     .sign(getJwtSecret());
47: }
48: 
49: // Verify JWT token
50: export async function verifyToken(token: string): Promise<Session | null> {
51:   try {
52:     const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, getJwtSecret());
53:     return payload as unknown as Session;
54:   } catch {
55:     return null;
56:   }
57: }
58: 
59: // Create session
60: export async function createSession(
61:   userId: string,
62:   email: string,
63:   name: string,
64:   options?: {
65:     ipAddress?: string;
66:     userAgent?: string;
67:   }
68: ): Promise<string> {
69:   const token = await createToken({
70:     userId,
71:     email,
72:     name,
73:     role: 'admin',
74:     expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + SESSION_DURATION * 1000),
75:   });
76: 
77:   // Store in database
78:   await db.session.create({
79:     data: {
80:       token,
81:       userId,
82:       expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + SESSION_DURATION * 1000),
83:       ipAddress: options?.ipAddress,
84:       userAgent: options?.userAgent,
85:     },
86:   });
87: 
88:   return token;
89: }
90: 
91: // Get current session from cookies
92: export async function getSession(): Promise<Session | null> {
93:   const cookieStore = await cookies();
94:   const token = cookieStore.get('admin-session')?.value;
95:   
96:   if (!token) return null;
97:   
98:   const session = await verifyToken(token);
99:   if (!session) return null;
100: 
101:   const persistedSession = await db.session.findUnique({
102:     where: { token },
103:     include: {
104:       user: {
105:         select: {
106:           email: true,
107:           name: true,
108:           role: true,
109:           isActive: true,
110:         },
111:       },
112:     },
113:   }).catch(() => null);
114: 
115:   if (!persistedSession || !persistedSession.user.isActive) {
116:     await deleteSession(token);
117:     return null;
118:   }
119:   
120:   // Check if session is expired
121:   if (new Date() > new Date(session.expiresAt) || new Date() > persistedSession.expiresAt) {
122:     await deleteSession(token);
123:     return null;
124:   }
125:   
126:   return {
127:     id: persistedSession.id,
128:     userId: persistedSession.userId,
129:     email: persistedSession.user.email,
130:     name: persistedSession.user.name || session.name,
131:     role: persistedSession.user.role as Session['role'],
132:     expiresAt: persistedSession.expiresAt,
133:   };
134: }
135: 
136: // Delete session
137: export async function deleteSession(token: string): Promise<void> {
138:   const cookieStore = await cookies();
139:   cookieStore.delete('admin-session');
140:   
141:   try {
142:     await db.session.delete({
143:       where: { token },
144:     });
145:   } catch {
146:     // Session might not exist in DB
147:   }
148: }
149: 
150: // Set session cookie
151: export async function setSessionCookie(token: string): Promise<void> {
152:   const cookieStore = await cookies();
153:   cookieStore.set('admin-session', token, {
154:     httpOnly: true,
155:     secure: env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
156:     sameSite: 'strict',
157:     maxAge: SESSION_DURATION,
158:     path: '/',
159:   });
160: }
161: 
162: // Rate limiting for login attempts
163: export function checkRateLimit(identifier: string): boolean {
164:   return rateLimit(identifier, {
165:     limit: 5,
166:     windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,
167:     prefix: 'login',
168:   }).allowed;
169: }
170: 
171: // Clear rate limit
172: export function clearRateLimit(identifier: string): void {
173:   clearScopedRateLimit(identifier, 'login');
174: }
175: 
176: // Generate secure random token
177: export function generateSecureToken(length: number = 32): string {
178:   return randomBytes(length).toString('hex').slice(0, length);
179: }

(End of file - total 179 lines)
</content>

parts.text: Now let's examine the API routes, starting with the admin auth route:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/app/api/admin/auth/route.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
2: import { db } from '@/lib/db';
3: import { checkRateLimit, clearRateLimit, createSession, getSession, setSessionCookie, verifyPassword } from '@/lib/auth';
4: import { logActivity } from '@/lib/activity';
5: import { getClientIp, getUserAgent } from '@/lib/request';
6: 
7: // GET /api/admin/auth - Check current session
8: export async function GET() {
9:   try {
10:     const session = await getSession();
11: 
12:     if (!session) {
13:       return NextResponse.json({ authenticated: false }, { status: 401 });
14:     }
15: 
16:     return NextResponse.json({
17:       authenticated: true,
18:       user: {
19:         userId: session.userId,
20:         email: session.email,
21:         name: session.name,
22:         role: session.role,
23:       },
24:     });
25:   } catch (error) {
26:     console.error('Auth check error:', error);
27:     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
28:   }
29: }
30: 
31: // POST /api/admin/auth - Login
32: export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
33:   try {
34:     const body = await request.json();
35:     const { email, password } = body;
36: 
37:     // Validation
38:     if (!email || !password) {
39:       return NextResponse.json(
40:         { error: 'Email and password are required' },
41:         { status: 400 }
42:       );
43:     }
44: 
45:     // Rate limiting
46:     const clientIp = getClientIp(request);
47:     if (!checkRateLimit(clientIp)) {
48:       return NextResponse.json(
49:         { error: 'Too many login attempts. Please try again later.' },
50:         { status: 429 }
51:       );
52:     }
53: 
54:     // Find user
55:     const user = await db.adminUser.findUnique({
56:       where: { email },
57:     });
58: 
59:     if (!user) {
60:       return NextResponse.json(
61:         { error: 'Invalid credentials' },
62:         { status: 401 }
63:       );
64:     }
65: 
66:     // Verify password
67:     if (!user.passwordHash) {
68:       return NextResponse.json(
69:         { error: 'Password login is not configured for this account.' },
70:         { status: 403 }
71:       );
72:     }
73: 
74:     const isValid = await verifyPassword(password, user.passwordHash);
75: 
76:     if (!isValid) {
77:       return NextResponse.json(
78:         { error: 'Invalid credentials' },
79:         { status: 401 }
80:       );
81:     }
82: 
83:     // Update last login
84:     await db.adminUser.update({
85:       where: { id: user.id },
86:       data: { lastLoginAt: new Date() },
87:     });
88: 
89:     // Create session
90:     const token = await createSession(user.id, user.email, user.name || 'Admin', {
91:       ipAddress: clientIp,
92:       userAgent: getUserAgent(request),
93:     });
94:     await setSessionCookie(token);
95:     clearRateLimit(clientIp);
96: 
97:     await logActivity({
98:       action: 'login',
99:       resource: 'admin-session',
100:       resourceId: user.id,
101:       userId: user.id,
102:       request,
103:       details: {
104:         method: 'password',
105:       },
106:     });
107: 
108:     return NextResponse.json({
109:       success: true,
110:       user: {
111:         id: user.id,
112:         email: user.email,
113:         name: user.name,
114:         role: user.role,
115:       },
116:     });
117:   } catch (error) {
118:     console.error('Login error:', error);
119:     return NextResponse.json(
120:       { error: 'Internal server error' },
121:       { status: 500 }
122:     );
123:   }
124: }

(End of file - total 124 lines)
</content>

5:   if (forwardedFor) {
6:     return forwardedFor.split(',')[0]?.trim() || 'unknown';
7:   }
8:

parts.text: Let me check the rate limiting implementation:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/lib/rate-limit.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: interface RateLimitOptions {
2:   limit: number;
3:   windowMs: number;
4:   prefix?: string;
5: }
6: 
7: interface RateLimitState {
8:   count: number;
9:   resetAt: number;
10: }
11: 
12: export interface RateLimitResult {
13:   allowed: boolean;
14:   remaining: number;
15:   resetAt: number;
16: }
17: 
18: const rateLimitStore = new Map<string, RateLimitState>();
19: 
20: function createStoreKey(identifier: string, prefix = 'global') {
21:   return `${prefix}:${identifier}`;
22: }
23: 
24: export function rateLimit(identifier: string, options: RateLimitOptions): RateLimitResult {
25:   const now = Date.now();
26:   const storeKey = createStoreKey(identifier, options.prefix);
27:   const existing = rateLimitStore.get(storeKey);
28: 
29:   if (!existing || now > existing.resetAt) {
30:     rateLimitStore.set(storeKey, {
31:       count: 1,
32:       resetAt: now + options.windowMs,
33:     });
34: 
35:     return {
36:       allowed: true,
37:       remaining: Math.max(options.limit - 1, 0),
38:       resetAt: now + options.windowMs,
39:     };
40:   }
41: 
42:   if (existing.count >= options.limit) {
43:     return {
44:       allowed: false,
45:       remaining: 0,
46:       resetAt: existing.resetAt,
47:     };
48:   }
49: 
50:   existing.count += 1;
51: 
52:   return {
53:     allowed: true,
54:     remaining: Math.max(options.limit - existing.count, 0),
55:     resetAt: existing.resetAt,
56:   };
57: }
58: 
59: export function clearRateLimit(identifier: string, prefix = 'global') {
60:   rateLimitStore.delete(createStoreKey(identifier, prefix));
61: }

(End of file - total 61 lines)
</content>

parts.text: Let me check the upload route:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/app/api/upload/route.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
2: import { db } from '@/lib/db';
3: import { getSession } from '@/lib/auth';
4: import { logActivity } from '@/lib/activity';
5: import { getClientIp } from '@/lib/request';
6: import { rateLimit } from '@/lib/rate-limit';
7: import { formatFileSize, getFileCategory } from '@/lib/upload';
8: import { deleteStoredAsset, processFileUpload } from '@/lib/upload-server';
9: 
10: // POST /api/upload - Upload files
11: export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
12:   try {
13:     // Check authentication
14:     const session = await getSession();
15:     if (!session) {
16:       return NextResponse.json(
17:         { error: 'Unauthorized' },
18:         { status: 401 }
19:       );
20:     }
21: 
22:     // Parse form data
23:     const formData = await request.formData();
24:     const files = formData.getAll('files') as File[];
25: 
26:     if (!files || files.length === 0) {
27:       return NextResponse.json(
28:         { error: 'No files provided' },
29:         { status: 400 }
30:       );
31:     }
32: 
33:     const uploadLimit = rateLimit(`${session.userId}:${getClientIp(request)}`, {
34:       limit: 20,
35:       windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,
36:       prefix: 'upload',
37:     });
38: 
39:     if (!uploadLimit.allowed) {
40:       return NextResponse.json(
41:         { error: 'Upload rate limit exceeded. Please wait before trying again.' },
42:         { status: 429 }
43:       );
44:     }
45: 
46:     // Process each file
47:     const results = await Promise.all(
48:       files.map(async (file) => {
49:         const uploadResult = await processFileUpload(file);
50: 
51:         if (!uploadResult.success) {
52:           return {
53:             success: false,
54:             originalName: file.name,
55:             error: uploadResult.error,
56:           };
57:         }
58: 
59:         // Save to database
60:         const media = await db.media.create({
61:           data: {
62:             id: uploadResult.id,
63:             filename: uploadResult.filename!,
64:             originalName: uploadResult.originalName,
65:             mimeType: uploadResult.mimeType,
66:             category: getFileCategory(uploadResult.mimeType),
67:             size: uploadResult.size,
68:             width: uploadResult.width,
69:             height: uploadResult.height,
70:             duration: uploadResult.duration,
71:             url: uploadResult.url!,
72:             thumbnailUrl: uploadResult.thumbnailUrl,
73:             uploadedById: session.userId,
74:           },
75:         });
76: 
77:         return {
78:           success: true,
79:           media: {
80:             id: media.id,
81:             filename: media.filename,
82:             originalName: media.originalName,
83:             url: media.url,
84:             thumbnailUrl: media.thumbnailUrl,
85:             category: media.category,
86:             size: formatFileSize(media.size),
87:             width: media.width,
88:             height: media.height,
89:           },
90:         };
91:       })
92:     );
93: 
94:     const successful = results.filter(r => r.success);
95:     const failed = results.filter(r => !r.success);
96: 
97:     if (successful.length > 0) {
98:       await logActivity({
99:         action: 'upload',
100:         resource: 'media',
101:         userId: session.userId,
102:         request,
103:         details: {
104:           uploaded: successful.length,
105:           failed: failed.length,
106:         },
107:       });
108:     }
109: 
110:     return NextResponse.json({
111:       success: true,
112:       uploaded: successful.length,
113:       failed: failed.length,
114:       results,
115:     });
116:   } catch (error) {
117:     console.error('Upload error:', error);
118:     return NextResponse.json(
119:       { error: 'Failed to process upload' },
120:       { status: 500 }
121:     );
122:   }
123: }
124: 
125: // GET /api/upload - List media files
126: export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
127:   try {
128:     const session = await getSession();
129:     if (!session) {
130:       return NextResponse.json(
131:         { error: 'Unauthorized' },
132:         { status: 401 }
133:       );
134:     }
135: 
136:     const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
137:     const category = searchParams.get('category');
138:     const folder = searchParams.get('folder');
139:     const page = Math.max(parseInt(searchParams.get('page') || '1', 10), 1);
140:     const limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(searchParams.get('limit') || '20', 10), 1), 100);
141:     const search = searchParams.get('search');
142: 
143:     // Build where clause
144:     const where: any = {};
145:     if (category) where.category = category;
146:     if (folder) where.folder = folder;
147:     if (search) {
148:       where.OR = [
149:         { originalName: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
150:         { tags: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
151:       ];
152:     }
153: 
154:     // Get total count
155:     const total = await db.media.count({ where });
156: 
157:     // Get media files
158:     const media = await db.media.findMany({
159:       where,
160:       orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
161:       skip: (page - 1) * limit,
162:       take: limit,
163:       include: {
164:         _count: {
165:           select: {
166:             articleUsages: true,
167:             projectUsages: true,
168:           },
169:         },
170:       },
171:     });
172: 
173:     return NextResponse.json({
174:       success: true,
175:       media,
176:       pagination: {
177:         page,
178:         limit,
179:         total,
180:         totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
181:       },
182:     });
183:   } catch (error) {
184:     console.error('Media list error:', error);
185:     return NextResponse.json(
186:       { error: 'Failed to fetch media' },
187:       { status: 500 }
188:     );
189:   }
190: }
191: 
192: // DELETE /api/upload - Delete media files
193: export async function DELETE(request: NextRequest) {
194:   try {
195:     const session = await getSession();
196:     if (!session) {
197:       return NextResponse.json(
198:         { error: 'Unauthorized' },
199:         { status: 401 }
200:       );
201:     }
202: 
203:     const body = await request.json();
204:     const { ids } = body;
205: 
206:     if (!ids || !Array.isArray(ids) || ids.length === 0) {
207:       return NextResponse.json(
208:         { error: 'No media IDs provided' },
209:         { status: 400 }
210:       );
211:     }
212: 
213:     const mediaItems = await db.media.findMany({
214:       where: { id: { in: ids } },
215:       select: {
216:         id: true,
217:         url: true,
218:         thumbnailUrl: true,
219:       },
220:     });
221: 
222:     const result = await db.media.deleteMany({
223:       where: { id: { in: ids } },
224:     });
225: 
226:     await Promise.all(
227:       mediaItems.flatMap((item) => [
228:         deleteStoredAsset(item.url),
229:         deleteStoredAsset(item.thumbnailUrl),
230:       ])
231:     );
232: 
233:     await logActivity({
234:       action: 'delete',
235:       resource: 'media',
236:       userId: session.userId,
237:       request,
238:       details: {
239:         deleted: result.count,
240:       },
241:     });
242: 
243:     return NextResponse.json({
244:       success: true,
245:       deleted: result.count,
246:     });
247:   } catch (error) {
248:     console.error('Media delete error:', error);
249:     return NextResponse.json(
250:       { error: 'Failed to delete media' },
251:       { status: 500 }
252:     );
253:   }
254: }

(End of file - total 254 lines)
</content>

parts.text: Let me check the upload server utilities:

state.output:
<path>/home/donovan/Projects/DoulgasMitchell.info/src/lib/upload-server.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { existsSync } from 'fs';
2: import { mkdir, unlink, writeFile } from 'fs/promises';
3: import { extname, join } from 'path';
4: import sharp from 'sharp';
5: import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
6: import { env } from '@/lib/env';
7: import {
8:   type UploadResult,
9:   getFileCategory,
10:   validateFileSize,
11:   validateFileType,
12: } from '@/lib/upload';
13: 
14: const UPLOAD_DIR = env.UPLOAD_DIR;
15: 
16: export function generateUniqueFilename(originalName: string): string {
17:   const ext = extname(originalName);
18:   const uniqueId = uuidv4();
19:   return `${uniqueId}${ext}`;
20: }
21: 
22: export async function getImageDimensions(buffer: Buffer): Promise<{ width: number; height: number } | null> {
23:   try {
24:     const metadata = await sharp(buffer).metadata();
25:     if (metadata.width && metadata.height) {
26:       return { width: metadata.width, height: metadata.height };
27:     }
28:     return null;
29:   } catch {
30:     return null;
31:   }
32: }
33: 
34: export async function createThumbnail(
35:   buffer: Buffer,
36:   filename: string,
37:   width: number = 300
38: ): Promise<string | null> {
39:   try {
40:     const thumbnailDir = join(UPLOAD_DIR, 'thumbnails');
41:     if (!existsSync(thumbnailDir)) {
42:       await mkdir(thumbnailDir, { recursive: true });
43:     }
44: 
45:     const thumbnailFilename = `thumb-${width}-${filename}`;
46:     const thumbnailPath = join(thumbnailDir, thumbnailFilename);
47: 
48:     await sharp(buffer)
49:       .resize(width, null, { withoutEnlargement: true })
50:       .jpeg({ quality: 80 })
51:       .toFile(thumbnailPath);
52: 
53:     return `/uploads/thumbnails/${thumbnailFilename}`;
54:   } catch (error) {
55:     console.error('Thumbnail creation failed:', error);
56:     return null;
57:   }
58: }
59: 
60: export async function optimizeImage(buffer: Buffer, mimeType: string): Promise<Buffer> {
61:   try {
62:     if (mimeType === 'image/svg+xml') {
63:       return buffer;
64:     }
65: 
66:     const sharpInstance = sharp(buffer);
67:     const metadata = await sharpInstance.metadata();
68:     if (metadata.width && metadata.width > 2048) {
69:       sharpInstance.resize(2048, null, { withoutEnlargement: true });
70:     }
71: 
72:     if (mimeType !== 'image/webp' && mimeType !== 'image/avif') {
73:       return await sharpInstance.webp({ quality: 85 }).toBuffer();
74:     }
75: 
76:     return await sharpInstance.toBuffer();
77:   } catch {
78:     return buffer;
79:   }
80: }
81: 
82: function replaceExtension(filename: string, extension: string) {
83:   return filename.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, extension);
84: }
85: 
86: export async function saveFile(buffer: Buffer, filename: string, category: string): Promise<string> {
87:   const categoryDir = join(UPLOAD_DIR, category);
88: 
89:   if (!existsSync(categoryDir)) {
90:     await mkdir(categoryDir, { recursive: true });
91:   }
92: 
93:   const filePath = join(categoryDir, filename);
94:   await writeFile(filePath, buffer);
95: 
96:   return `/uploads/${category}/${filename}`;
97: }
98: 
99: export async function processFileUpload(
100:   file: File,
101:   options: {
102:     createThumbnail?: boolean;
103:     optimizeImages?: boolean;
104:   } = {}
105: ): Promise<UploadResult> {
106:   const { createThumbnail: shouldCreateThumbnail = true, optimizeImages = true } = options;
107: 
108:   try {
109:     const typeValidation = validateFileType(file.type);
110:     if (!typeValidation.valid) {
111:       return { success: false, error: typeValidation.error, originalName: file.name, mimeType: file.type, size: file.size };
112:     }
113: 
114:     const sizeValidation = validateFileSize(file.size);
115:     if (!sizeValidation.valid) {
116:       return { success: false, error: sizeValidation.error, originalName: file.name, mimeType: file.type, size: file.size };
117:     }
118: 
119:     const category = getFileCategory(file.type);
120:     let outputMimeType = file.type;
121:     const uniqueFilename = generateUniqueFilename(file.name);
122:     let outputFilename = uniqueFilename;
123: 
124:     const bytes = await file.arrayBuffer();
125:     let buffer: Buffer = Buffer.from(bytes) as Buffer;
126: 
127:     let width: number | undefined;
128:     let height: number | undefined;
129:     let duration: number | undefined;
130:     let thumbnailUrl: string | undefined;
131: 
132:     if (category === 'image') {
133:       const dimensions = await getImageDimensions(buffer);
134:       if (dimensions) {
135:         width = dimensions.width;
136:         height = dimensions.height;
137:       }
138: 
139:       if (optimizeImages) {
140:         buffer = await optimizeImage(buffer, file.type);
141:         if (file.type !== 'image/svg+xml' && file.type !== 'image/webp' && file.type !== 'image/avif') {
142:           outputFilename = replaceExtension(uniqueFilename, '.webp');
143:           outputMimeType = 'image/webp';
144:         }
145:       }
146: 
147:       if (shouldCreateThumbnail && dimensions) {
148:         thumbnailUrl = (await createThumbnail(buffer, outputFilename)) ?? undefined;
149:       }
150:     }
151: 
152:     const url = await saveFile(buffer, outputFilename, category);
153: 
154:     return {
155:       success: true,
156:       id: uuidv4(),
157:       filename: outputFilename,
158:       originalName: file.name,
159:       mimeType: outputMimeType,
160:       size: file.size,
161:       width,
162:       height,
163:       duration,
164:       url,
165:       thumbnailUrl,
166:     };
167:   } catch (error) {
168:     console.error('File upload error:', error);
169:     return {
170:       success: false,
171:       error: 'Failed to process file upload',
172:       originalName: file.name,
173:       mimeType: file.type,
174:       size: file.size,
175:     };
176:   }
177: }
178: 
179: function resolveStoragePath(url: string) {
180:   if (!url.startsWith('/uploads/')) return null;
181:   return join(UPLOAD_DIR, url.replace('/uploads/', ''));
182: }
183: 
184: export async function deleteStoredAsset(url?: string | null) {
185:   if (!url) return;
186: 
187:   const filePath = resolveStoragePath(url);
188:   if (!filePath || !existsSync(filePath)) return;
189: 
190:   await unlink(filePath).catch(() => undefined);
191: }

(End of file - total 191 lines)
</content>

<content>1: // Douglas Mitchell Editorial Platform - Content Model
2: // Single source of truth for all content
3: 
4: generator client {
5:   provider = "prisma-client-js"
6: }
7: 
8: datasource db {
9:   provider = "postgresql"
10:   url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
11: }
12: 
13: // Core Content Models
14: model Article {
15:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
16:   slug        String   @unique
17:   title       String
18:   subtitle    String?
19:   excerpt     String
20:   content     String   // Markdown content
21:   coverImage  String?
22:   category    String   // essay, technical, insight, case-study
23:   tags        String   // JSON array of tags
24:   featured    Boolean  @default(false)
25:   published   Boolean  @default(false)
26:   publishedAt DateTime?
27:   readingTime Int      @default(5)
28:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
29:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
30:   
31:   // Relations
32:   blocks      ArticleBlock[]
33:   media       ArticleMedia[]
34:   comments    Comment[]
35:   reactions   Reaction[]
36:   
37:   @@index([slug])
38:   @@index([category])
39:   @@index([published, featured])
40: }
41: 
42: model ArticleBlock {
43:   id        String  @id @default(cuid())
44:   articleId String
45:   article   Article @relation(fields: [articleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
46:   blockType String  // text, quote, code, image, divider, ascii-art, evidence-grid
47:   content   String  // JSON content specific to block type
48:   order     Int
49:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
50:   
51:   @@index([articleId, order])
52: }
53: 
54: model Project {
55:   id            String   @id @default(cuid())
56:   slug          String   @unique
57:   title         String
58:   subtitle      String?
59:   description   String
60:   longDescription String?
61:   coverImage    String?
62:   githubUrl     String?
63:   liveUrl       String?
64:   techStack     String   // JSON array of technologies
65:   category      String   // ai-automation, web-development, system-design, open-source
66:   featured      Boolean  @default(false)
67:   status        String   @default("completed") // completed, in-progress, archived
68:   startDate     DateTime?
69:   endDate       DateTime?
70:   createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
71:   updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
72: 
73:   media         ProjectMedia[]
74:   comments      Comment[]
75:   reactions     Reaction[]
76:   
77:   @@index([slug])
78:   @@index([category])
79:   @@index([featured])
80: }
81: 
82: model Certification {
83:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
84:   title       String
85:   issuer      String
86:   issuerLogo  String?
87:   credentialUrl String?
88:   issueDate   DateTime
89:   expiryDate  DateTime?
90:   credentialId String?
91:   description String?
92:   skills      String   // JSON array of skills
93:   featured    Boolean  @default(false)
94:   order       Int      @default(0)
95:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
96:   
97:   @@index([featured, order])
98: }
99: 
100: model Book {
101:   id            String   @id @default(cuid())
102:   title         String
103:   subtitle      String?
104:   description   String
105:   coverImage    String?
106:   amazonUrl     String?
107:   publisher     String?
108:   publishDate   DateTime?
109:   isbn          String?
110:   pages         Int?
111:   featured      Boolean  @default(true)
112:   createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
113:   updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
114: }
115: 
116: model SiteConfig {
117:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
118:   key         String   @unique
119:   value       String   // JSON value
120:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
121: }
122: 
123: model ContactSubmission {
124:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
125:   name      String
126:   email     String
127:   subject   String?
128:   message   String
129:   source    String?  // Where the submission came from
130:   status    String   @default("new") // new, read, responded, archived
131:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
132:   
133:   @@index([status, createdAt])
134: }
135: 
136: // ============================================
137: // AUTHENTICATION & AUTHORIZATION
138: // ============================================
139: 
140: model AdminUser {
141:   id           String   @id @default(cuid())
142:   email        String   @unique
143:   name         String?
144:   passwordHash String?
145:   role         String   @default("admin") // admin, editor
146:   avatar       String?
147:   bio          String?
148:   lastLoginAt  DateTime?
149:   isActive     Boolean  @default(true)
150:   createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
151:   updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt
152:   
153:   // Relations
154:   sessions     Session[]
155:   passkeys     PasskeyCredential[]
156:   activityLogs ActivityLog[]
157:   
158:   @@index([email])
159:   @@index([isActive])
160: }
161: 
162: model Session {
163:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
164:   token     String   @unique
165:   userId    String
166:   user      AdminUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
167:   expiresAt DateTime
168:   ipAddress String?
169:   userAgent String?
170:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
171:   
172:   @@index([token])
173:   @@index([userId])
174:   @@index([expiresAt])
175: }
176: 
177: model PasskeyCredential {
178:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
179:   credentialId String  @unique
180:   userId      String
181:   user        AdminUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
182:   publicKey   Bytes
183:   counter     Int      @default(0)
184:   deviceType  String?  // platform, cross-platform
185:   deviceName  String?  // e.g., "MacBook Pro Touch ID"
186:   lastUsedAt  DateTime?
187:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
188:   
189:   @@index([userId])
190:   @@index([credentialId])
191: }
192: 
193: // ============================================
194: // MEDIA MANAGEMENT
195: // ============================================
196: 
197: model Media {
198:   id            String   @id @default(cuid())
199:   filename      String   @unique
200:   originalName  String
201:   mimeType      String
202:   category      String   // image, video, audio, document
203:   size          Int
204:   width         Int?     // for images/videos
205:   height        Int?     // for images/videos
206:   duration      Int?     // for videos/audio (seconds)
207:   url           String
208:   thumbnailUrl  String?
209:   alt           String?  // accessibility text
210:   caption       String?
211:   description   String?
212:   tags          String?  // JSON array
213:   folder        String   @default("uncategorized")
214:   uploadedById  String?
215:   isPublic      Boolean  @default(true)
216:   createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
217:   updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
218:   
219:   // Relations
220:   articleUsages ArticleMedia[]
221:   projectUsages ProjectMedia[]
222:   
223:   @@index([category])
224:   @@index([folder])
225:   @@index([mimeType])
226:   @@index([createdAt])
227: }
228: 
229: // Many-to-many: Articles <-> Media
230: model ArticleMedia {
231:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
232:   articleId String
233:   article   Article  @relation(fields: [articleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
234:   mediaId   String
235:   media     Media    @relation(fields: [mediaId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
236:   order     Int      @default(0)
237:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
238:   
239:   @@unique([articleId, mediaId])
240:   @@index([articleId])
241:   @@index([mediaId])
242: }
243: 
244: // Many-to-many: Projects <-> Media
245: model ProjectMedia {
246:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
247:   projectId String
248:   project   Project  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
249:   mediaId   String
250:   media     Media    @relation(fields: [mediaId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
251:   order     Int      @default(0)
252:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
253:   
254:   @@unique([projectId, mediaId])
255:   @@index([projectId])
256:   @@index([mediaId])
257: }
258: 
259: // ============================================
260: // SOCIAL FEATURES
261: // ============================================
262: 
263: model Comment {
264:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
265:   content     String
266:   authorName  String
267:   authorEmail String
268:   authorUrl   String?
269:   articleId   String?
270:   article     Article? @relation(fields: [articleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
271:   projectId   String?
272:   project     Project? @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
273:   parentId    String?
274:   parent      Comment?  @relation("CommentReplies", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
275:   replies     Comment[] @relation("CommentReplies")
276:   isApproved  Boolean   @default(false)
277:   isSpam      Boolean   @default(false)
278:   likes       Int       @default(0)
279:   createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
280:   updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt
281:   
282:   @@index([articleId])
283:   @@index([projectId])
284:   @@index([isApproved, isSpam])
285:   @@index([createdAt])
286: }
287: 
288: model Reaction {
289:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
290:   type      String   // like, love, applaud, insightful
291:   articleId String?
292:   article   Article? @relation(fields: [articleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
293:   projectId String?
294:   project   Project? @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
295:   sessionId String   // anonymous tracking
296:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
297:   
298:   @@unique([articleId, projectId, sessionId, type])
299:   @@index([articleId])
300:   @@index([projectId])
301: }
302: 
303: model Newsletter {
304:   id        String   @id @default(cuid())
305:   email     String   @unique
306:   name      String?
307:   isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
308:   confirmedAt DateTime?
309:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
310:   
311:   @@index([email])
312:   @@index([isActive])
313: }
314: 
315: // ============================================
316: // ANALYTICS & LOGGING
317: // ============================================
318: 
319: model ActivityLog {
320:   id         String   @id @default(cuid())
321:   action     String   // create, update, delete, login, logout, publish, etc.
322:   resource   String   // article, project, media, user, etc.
323:   resourceId String?
324:   details    String?  // JSON string with additional data
325:   userId     String?
326:   user       AdminUser? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
327:   ipAddress  String?
328:   userAgent  String?
329:   createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
330:   
331:   @@index([action])
332:   @@index([resource])
333:   @@index([userId])
334:   @@index([createdAt])
335: }
336: 
337: model PageView {
338:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
339:   path        String
340:   referrer    String?
341:   userAgent   String?
342:   ipAddress   String?
343:   country     String?
344:   city        String?
345:   sessionId   String
346:   duration    Int?     // seconds spent on page
347:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
348:   
349:   @@index([path])
350:   @@index([sessionId])
351:   @@index([createdAt])
352: }
353: 
354: // ============================================
355: // LAYOUT & THEMING
356: // ============================================
357: 
358: model LayoutBlock {
359:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
360:   name        String   @unique
361:   type        String   // hero, about, work, contact, custom
362:   isActive    Boolean  @default(true)
363:   order       Int      @default(0)
364:   settings    String   // JSON configuration
365:   content     String   // JSON content blocks
366:   styles      String?  // Custom CSS
367:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
368:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
369:   
370:   @@index([type])
371:   @@index([isActive, order])
372: }
373: 
374: model Setting {
375:   id          String   @id @default(cuid())
376:   key         String   @unique
377:   value       String   // JSON value
378:   type        String   @default("string") // string, number, boolean, json
379:   category    String   @default("general") // general, seo, social, analytics
380:   isPublic    Boolean  @default(false) // expose to frontend?
381:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
382:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
383:   
384:   @@index([key])
385:   @@index([category])
386: }

(End of file - total 386 lines)
</content>
